findings.question: Q1
findings.detail: Correctly identifies ledger package, 6 LedgerClient methods, hash chaining, threading.Lock, complete deliverable list. All paths match handoff.

findings.question: Q2
findings.detail: Correctly excludes FMWK-002/005/006, DEF-001/002, multi-process, async, kernel services. Scope boundaries precise.

findings.question: Q3
findings.detail: ALWAYS/ASK FIRST/NEVER boundaries correctly stated, traceable to D1 articles and D10 key patterns.

findings.question: Q4
findings.detail: All 6 inbound contract signatures and 8 error contracts verified against D4. ImmudbStore internal interface matches handoff.

findings.question: Q5
findings.detail: CRITICAL_REVIEW_REQUIRED resolved: platform_sdk.tier0_core.data is SQLAlchemy (verified), not immudb. Builder's ImmudbStore abstraction in store.py is the correct resolution, consistent with handoff architecture and existing SDK pattern. import immudb permitted only in store.py.

findings.question: Q6
findings.detail: All 4 entities (LedgerEvent 9 fields, Provenance 3 fields, TipRecord 2 fields, ChainVerificationResult 2 fields) verified against D3. EventType 15 values match D3/D4. Float-as-string, null inclusion, key format, hash format all correct.

findings.question: Q7
findings.detail: Package metadata correct. RESULTS.md and builder_evidence.json required fields all listed.

findings.question: Q8
findings.detail: Stdlib and platform_sdk dependencies correct. new_id(kind='uuid7') verified in ids.py:54. PlatformConfig immudb fields verified in config.py:46-50. immudb-py scoped to store.py only.

findings.question: Q9
findings.detail: Test distribution matches handoff plan. 60 explicitly named tests exceeds 55 target. TDD discipline and verification criteria correctly stated.

findings.question: Q10
findings.detail: Upstream/downstream callers correct. PlatformConfig wiring verified against live SDK. CLI integration and immudb wiring (port 3322, database 'ledger', key format, value format) correct.

findings.question: Q11
findings.detail: SC-011 mutex scope correctly identified as highest-risk misinterpretation. Failure mode (silent sequence fork) accurately described. Commits to lock before get_tip().

findings.question: Q12
findings.detail: verify_chain() + connection error correctly identified. D4 IN-005 postcondition 6 quoted exactly. Secondary risk (read_since exclusive boundary) also correct.

findings.question: Q13
findings.detail: 8 plausible evaluator probes, all traceable to D2/D4/D6 specifications.
